Interpreting “support source” as the sponsor fields (shirt/back/short), the “last year to both have and not have a support source” would be the most recent period where at least one sponsor field is filled and at least one is empty. From the table:

- 2009–2011 has a shirt sponsor (Mira Showers) and a back sponsor (PSU Technology Group), but no short sponsor, satisfying “both have and not have.” This is the most recent such period.

Therefore, the correct answer should be 2009–2011, not blank.
